name: finalproject
description: Monorepo: backend (Express API), frontend (Vite/React), database config

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build:traffic: cd frontend/traffic-app && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix frontend/traffic-app
